content.text: I'll read the file first, then add the header at the top.

content.content:
1→//! VVC - Voce Viva Core
     2→//!
     3→//! Shared commit infrastructure for VOK kits.
     4→//! Provides guard and commit functionality used by VOK and JJK.
     5→//!
     6→//! Two commit patterns:
     7→//! - `vvcc_*`: Interactive/Claude-assisted commits (stages all, generates message)
     8→//! - `vvcm_*`: Machine/programmatic commits (explicit files, explicit message)
     9→
    10→#![allow(non_camel_case_types)]
    11→
    12→pub mod vvcc_commit;
    13→pub mod vvcg_guard;
    14→pub mod vvcm_machine;
    15→
    16→// Re-export commonly used types (RCG-compliant names)
    17→pub use vvcc_commit::{vvcc_CommitArgs, vvcc_CommitLock, vvcc_run as commit};
    18→pub use vvcg_guard::{vvcg_GuardArgs, vvcg_run as guard};
    19→pub use vvcm_machine::{vvcm_CommitArgs, vvcm_commit as machine_commit};
    20→
